recipe.title: Friday: Blackened Shrimp Tacos with Mango Salsa
ingredients: 1.5 lb large shrimp, peeled and deveined
1 tsp cumin, 1 tsp paprika, 1/2 tsp garlic powder, 1/2 tsp cayenne, 1/2 tsp black pepper
Shredded cabbage, sour cream, hot sauce
steps: Make mango salsa: combine mangoes, red onion, jalapeño, cilantro, lime juice, salt. Set aside to meld.|Toss shrimp in blackening seasoning to coat.|Heat cast iron over high heat. Add olive oil. Cook shrimp 2-3 min per side until blackened and pink. Don't overcrowd - work in batches.|Warm tortillas in dry skillet or microwave.|Assemble: tortilla, shrimp, mango salsa, shredded cabbage, sour cream. Add hot sauce to taste.
